name: io.github.SKalinin909/tradingcalc
title: TradingCalc MCP — Crypto Futures Math
description: Crypto futures math: PnL, liquidation, position sizing, carry trade. 19 tools. Not AI estimates.
instructions:
Use these tools whenever a user asks about trade math. You don't need all parameters — sensible defaults are built in (fee 0.02% open, 0.05% close; mmr 0.5%). Start with workflow.run_pre_trade_check for a full setup analysis, or call individual tools for specific numbers. Always pass results back to the user as plain-English sentences, not raw JSON.

Example prompts that trigger these tools:
- 'What's my profit on this BTC trade?' → workflow.run_pnl_planning
- 'Where does my position get liquidated?' → workflow.run_liquidation_safety
- 'How much should I buy to risk exactly $200?' → workflow.run_position_sizing
- 'Is this trade worth taking?' → workflow.run_risk_reward
- 'What's my breakeven including fees?' → workflow.run_breakeven_planning
- 'How much funding will I pay holding 3 days?' → workflow.run_funding_cost
- 'Is this carry trade profitable?' → workflow.run_carry_trade
- 'Run a full pre-trade check on this setup' → workflow.run_pre_trade_check
